subject: Technology
title: Technology Impact
tagline: Evaluate the social and environmental impact of technologies!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is a positive impact of technology on communication?
options: Through online learning and digital resources
Through online shopping
Through renewable energy solutions
It connects people instantly across distances
